静态生成\r\n- `getServerSideProps` - 服务端渲染\r\n- `getStaticPaths` - 动态路由\r\n\r\n## 总结\r\n\r\nNext.js 让全栈开发变得简单！\r\n","excerpt":"学习 Next.js 的基础知识","coverImage":"","category":{"name":"教程","slug":"教程"},"tags":[{"name":"Next.js","slug":"Next.js"},{"name":"React","slug":"React"},{"name":"前端","slug":"前端"}],"author":{"name":"Admin","email":"admin@example.com"},"published":true,"views":0,"createdAt":"2026-04-27","updatedAt":"2026-04-27"}],"categories":[{"_id":"技术","name":"技术","slug":"技术"},{"_id":"教程","name":"教程","slug":"教程"}],"tags":[{"_id":"Next.js","name":"Next.js","slug":"Next.js"},{"_id":"博客","name":"博客","slug":"博客"},{"_id":"React","name":"React","slug":"React"},{"_id":"前端","name":"前端","slug":"前端"}]}],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0fi_icfhadr62.js","async":true}]],["$","$L3",null,{"children":["$","$4",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@5"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"Kg7cuSMyiseKqXRM-wecf"}
